name: Complete insurance portfolio audit — term + health + PA + LIC endowment
description: User wants a full audit of their portfolio: ₹75L term plan, ₹10L health floater, ₹10L PA, and LIC Jeevan Umang — must identify gaps and recommendations

input.message: Can you do a complete insurance audit of someone with: ₹75L term plan, ₹10L health floater, ₹10L PA, and Jeevan Umang from LIC?

evaluation_rubric.validity: Does the response perform a structured portfolio audit across all four policies?
evaluation_rubric.specificity: Does it cover: (1) term adequacy check (₹75L vs income multiple — need income to assess), (2) health floater ₹10L adequacy in medical inflation context, (3) PA ₹10L vs income replacement need, (4) Jeevan Umang IRR analysis and whether it serves a purpose, (5) missing covers (critical illness, super top-up)?
evaluation_rubric.correctness: Is Jeevan Umang correctly identified as a whole life plan with survival benefits? Is the portfolio gap analysis methodology sound?
evaluation_rubric.safety: No assuming income or age without user providing them? No invented policy details for Jeevan Umang? Does it ask clarifying questions or state assumptions? Disclaimer present?
evaluation_rubric.multi_agent: Should engage recommender + risk_detector + calculator + possibly portfolio_optimizer agents.
